code:
import io
import string
import list

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      match string.parse_int(current)
      when Some(v)
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(current)
  match string.parse_int(current)
  when Some(v)
    nums = list.push(nums, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
let count = nums.len()
mut k = 0
while k < count
  let v = match nums.get(k)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  mut new_sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  let s_len = sorted.len()
  mut j = 0
  while j < s_len
    let sv = match sorted.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if not inserted and v <= sv
      new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, v)
      inserted = true
    end
    new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, sv)
    j = j + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, v)
  end
  sorted = new_sorted
  k = k + 1
end

mut out = ""
let total = sorted.len()
mut p = 0
while p < total
  let v = match sorted.get(p)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if p == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  p = p + 1
end
println(out)
